column11: The box will spring out upon enemy contact, Flee icon fearing nearby enemies for a duration, modified to 2.2 seconds against non-champions, and Root icon rooting them for a duration, modified to a 1 second root against non-champions. After a 0.15-second delay of the box's activation, enemies hit also have their Attack speed icon movement speed reduced. Enemy champions have their movement speed set to a static 100 for the same duration as the fear plus 0.25 seconds, while non-champions are set to a static 60 for 2.35 seconds.

column11: Active: Thresh throws out his scythe in the target direction, becoming Lockout icon 2 unable to move or attack while it is in flight. The scythe catches the first enemy hit to deal magic damage and Stun icon stun and True Sight icon reveal them for 1.5 seconds, as well as reduce Death Sentence's Cooldown icon current cooldown by 2 seconds. Thresh will also mark the target Shackled for 1.5 seconds, during which he is unable to declare basic attacks, and is Slow icon slowed by 20% for 1 second. Magic Damage: 100 / 150 / 200 / 250 / 300 (+ 90% AP) While the target is Stun icon stunned, Thresh tugs twice over 0.8 seconds, Airborne icon pulling the target a short distance with each tug. After 0.5 seconds of hitting an enemy or instantly after hitting a Minion icon minion or Monster icon monster, Thresh can recast the ability while the target is Shackled, which will cause him to stop tugging.
